title: Tick Control in Edison, NJ | Professional Tick Extermination $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Edison, NJ starting at $125. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases with expert tick extermination and prevention.
intro: Edison, New Jersey residents face increasing tick populations due to the area's abundant green spaces and proximity to wooded areas. Our professional tick control services protect your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses with comprehensive treatment plans starting at just $125. We provide targeted tick extermination for residential and commercial properties throughout Edison.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving the Edison community with environmentally responsible tick control solutions. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments and provide seasonal maintenance plans to keep your property tick-free year-round.
localContext: Edison's parks like Roosevelt Park and the extensive residential neighborhoods with landscaped yards create ideal habitats for tick populations. Whether you're near Menlo Park Mall, the historic Dismal Swamp Conservation Area, or in one of Edison's many suburban communities, our tick control services protect properties of all sizes from these dangerous pests.

faqs.question: What does tick control service include in Edison?
faqs.answer: Our tick control service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted application of tick treatments to high-risk areas like tall grass, shrubs, and wooded edges, perimeter treatment, and follow-up visits as needed. We focus on areas where ticks are most likely to harbor and where your family and pets frequent.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Edison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Edison typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active any time temperatures are above freezing. We recommend preventative treatments in early spring and maintenance treatments throughout the warm months for optimal protection.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. We recommend keeping people and pets off treated areas until they're dry (typically 2-4 hours). Our technicians provide specific instructions during service to ensure maximum safety for your family.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Edison?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Edison range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal packages that provide better value and year-round protection. Contact us for a free quote tailored to your specific property needs.
